name: Blooming Anthurium
desc: Lush anthurium in a hand-painted terracotta pot.
longDesc: This stunning Blooming Anthurium arrives in a handcrafted terracotta pot, painted with vibrant floral motifs. The anthurium waxy, heart-shaped blooms add a tropical elegance to any room. Each pot is individually decorated - no two are ever alike. The plant is healthy, well-rooted, and ready to brighten your home or make the perfect gift.
pot: Hand-painted terracotta with floral motifs

name: Rose Garden Planter
desc: Miniature rose bush in a botanical-decorated pot.
longDesc: A charming miniature rose bush planted in a beautifully decorated botanical pot. The pot features delicate leaf and vine patterns hand-painted by our artisans. Perfect for windowsills, study desks, or as a romantic gift. Comes with care instructions to keep your roses blooming all season.
pot: Botanical-decorated with leaf and vine patterns

name: Orchid Blush
desc: Elegant orchid in a coral and blush-toned pot.
longDesc: A graceful orchid paired with a coral and blush-toned decorated pot. The soft, warm palette of the pot complements the orchid delicate petals beautifully. This is one of our most popular combinations - elegant enough for a living room centrepiece, yet subtle enough for a bedroom shelf. Orchids symbolise love, beauty, and strength.
pot: Coral and blush-toned hand-decorated finish

name: Jasmine Dream
desc: Fragrant jasmine in a uniquely adorned clay pot.
longDesc: Fragrant jasmine nestled in an exquisitely adorned clay pot. The pot features intricate hand-carved patterns filled with gold-tinted paint, giving it a regal appearance. The jasmine sweet scent fills any room with tranquillity. This premium piece is perfect for those who appreciate fine craftsmanship and natural beauty combined.
pot: Uniquely adorned clay with gold-tinted accents

name: Spring Garden
desc: Lush greenery in a vibrant hand-painted nature planter.
longDesc: A lush arrangement of spring greenery in our vibrant hand-painted nature planter. The pot is decorated with scenes of birds, butterflies, and blooming flowers - a miniature garden in itself. Ideal for patios, balconies, or anywhere you want to bring the freshness of spring indoors.
pot: Hand-painted nature scene with birds and butterflies

name: Sunset Frangipani
desc: Classic frangipani in a sunset-gradient decorated pot.
longDesc: A classic frangipani tree in a stunning sunset-gradient decorated pot. The warm oranges and golds of the pot echo the tropical sunsets of Sri Lanka. Frangipani flowers are fragrant, long-lasting, and deeply symbolic of new beginnings. This is one of our best-selling designs.
pot: Sunset-gradient hand-painted finish

name: Heritage Hibiscus
desc: Vibrant hibiscus in a pot with traditional Sri Lankan motifs.
longDesc: A vibrant hibiscus in a premium pot decorated with traditional Sri Lankan heritage motifs. The pot design draws inspiration from ancient Kandyan art - intricate curves, lotus patterns, and rich earthy tones. This is more than a plant; it is a piece of Sri Lankan culture you can keep in your home.
pot: Traditional Sri Lankan Kandyan art motifs

name: Royal Marigold
desc: Bright marigolds in an intricately decorated premium pot.
longDesc: Bright, cheerful marigolds in one of our most intricately decorated premium pots. The pot features detailed mandala patterns and gold-leaf highlights, creating a truly regal presentation. Marigolds are a symbol of prosperity and good fortune - perfect for gifting or adorning your own space with beauty and meaning.
pot: Intricately decorated with mandala patterns and gold-leaf

name: Blush Chrysanthemum
desc: Soft pink chrysanthemum in a romantic textured pot.
longDesc: Soft pink chrysanthemums in a romantic textured pot. The pot features a gently textured surface with pastel tones and subtle shimmer, creating a dreamy, feminine aesthetic. Chrysanthemums symbolise joy and longevity. A lovely gift for someone special or a treat for yourself.
pot: Romantic textured with pastel tones and subtle shimmer

name: Crown Succulent
desc: Hardy succulents in a crown-styled hand-decorated pot.
longDesc: A collection of hardy, low-maintenance succulents arranged in our signature crown-styled pot. The pot is adorned with a crown motif in gold and deep burgundy tones. Succulents need minimal watering, making this the perfect gift for busy people who still want a touch of nature in their space.
pot: Crown-styled with gold and deep burgundy tones

name: Emerald Fern
desc: Deep green fern in a premium emerald-toned pot.
longDesc: A deep green fern in a premium emerald-toned pot. The pot is finished with a rich, jewel-like emerald glaze and hand-painted gold accents. Ferns are excellent air purifiers and thrive in indirect light. This premium piece makes a sophisticated addition to any interior.
pot: Premium emerald glaze with hand-painted gold accents

name: Tropical Palm
desc: Lush tropical plant in a golden-accented pot.
longDesc: A lush tropical palm in a beautifully decorated pot with golden accents. The pot tropical design features palm fronds and island textures, bringing a resort-like ambiance to your home. Easy to care for and visually striking - one of our consistent best sellers.
pot: Golden-accented with tropical palm frond design

name: Golden Orchid
desc: Stunning orchid in our most premium gold-leaf decorated pot.
longDesc: Our most exclusive orchid presentation. A stunning orchid arranged in our premium gold-leaf decorated pot - hand-finished with real gold-leaf accents and a deep matte black base. This is our finest offering for those who want nothing but the best. Each piece comes individually wrapped in our luxury gift packaging.
pot: Premium gold-leaf with deep matte black base

name: Zen Bonsai
desc: Miniature bonsai in a minimalist decorated pot.
longDesc: A carefully shaped miniature bonsai in a minimalist decorated pot. The pot features clean lines with subtle earth-tone accents, reflecting the zen philosophy of simplicity and balance. Bonsai trees represent harmony, patience, and the beauty of nature in miniature. A meditative addition to any desk or shelf.
pot: Minimalist with subtle earth-tone accents

name: Cottage Rose
desc: Cottage-style roses in a rustic floral-painted pot.
longDesc: Warm, cottage-style roses in a rustic floral-painted pot. The pot captures the charm of an English country garden with its hand-painted roses and weathered finish. This design evokes nostalgia and warmth - perfect for kitchens, reading nooks, or garden patios.
pot: Rustic floral-painted with weathered finish

name: Moon Jasmine
desc: Night-blooming jasmine in a bronze-finish pot.
longDesc: Night-blooming jasmine in a luxurious bronze-finish pot. The pot features a rich, antiqued bronze patina with delicate crescent moon motifs. Moon jasmine releases its heavenly fragrance in the evening hours, making it perfect for bedrooms and balconies. A premium piece for those who appreciate the finer things.
pot: Bronze-finish with crescent moon motifs

name: Moonlit Lily
desc: Elegant lily in a shimmery moonlight-inspired pot.
longDesc: An elegant lily in a shimmery moonlight-inspired pot. The pot captures the ethereal glow of moonlight with its pearlescent finish and silver highlights. Lilies symbolise purity and grace. This piece creates a serene atmosphere wherever it is placed - a wonderful choice for bedrooms or meditation spaces.
pot: Pearlescent moonlight finish with silver highlights

name: Sky Bloom
desc: Cheerful blooms in an earth-and-sky toned pot.
longDesc: Cheerful blooms in an earth-and-sky toned pot that brings together the colours of nature. The pot features a gradient from earthy browns at the base to soft sky blues at the rim, symbolising the connection between earth and sky. A consistently popular choice for its uplifting, joyful energy.
pot: Earth-and-sky gradient with natural tones

name: Saffron Dahlia
desc: Rich dahlia in a mandala-painted saffron pot.
longDesc: A rich, vibrant dahlia in a mandala-painted saffron pot. The pot intricate mandala design is inspired by Sri Lankan temple art, hand-painted in warm saffron and gold tones. Dahlias represent dignity, elegance, and inner strength. An exclusive piece that commands attention in any setting.
pot: Mandala-painted in saffron and gold tones

name: Coral Succulent
desc: Hardy succulent in an ocean-textured seaside pot.
longDesc: A hardy succulent in an ocean-textured seaside pot. The pot features a beautiful coral-reef texture with shades of turquoise, coral, and sandy beige. Inspired by Sri Lanka stunning coastline. Succulents are low-maintenance and long-lasting, making this a practical yet beautiful choice.
pot: Ocean-textured with turquoise and coral tones

name: Wildflower
desc: Free-spirited wildflowers in a natural-finish pot.
longDesc: Free-spirited wildflowers in a natural-finish pot that celebrates raw, untamed beauty. The pot has a deliberately organic, earthy finish with moss-green and terracotta tones. Wildflowers represent freedom and spontaneity. Our most affordable plant - perfect for first-time buyers or as a casual, cheerful gift.
pot: Natural-finish with moss-green and terracotta tones

name: Royal Heritage Planter
desc: Our masterwork. Finest arrangement in a gold-finished royal pot.
longDesc: Our absolute masterwork. The finest floral arrangement in a gold-finished royal pot. This is the pinnacle of our craft - every detail is painstaking hand-finished with real gold paint, intricate Sri Lankan heritage patterns, and a rich, deep base glaze. Comes in luxury packaging. The ultimate statement piece or the most unforgettable gift you can give.
pot: Gold-finished royal pot with Sri Lankan heritage patterns

name: Vintage Rose Art
desc: Hand-painted vintage rose design on a transformed pot.
longDesc: A breathtaking vintage rose design hand-painted on a transformed pot. This creation blends old-world charm with contemporary artistry - soft rose tones, aged textures, and delicate brushwork come together in a piece that looks like it belongs in an art gallery. Each piece is signed by the artist.
pot: Transformed pot with vintage rose hand-painting

name: Peacock Fantasy
desc: Vivid peacock-themed decorative art piece.
longDesc: A vivid peacock-themed decorative art piece that captures the majesty of the peacock in rich blues, greens, and golds. Hand-crafted with meticulous attention to detail - every feather is individually painted. This creation is a conversation starter that brings colour and life to any room.
pot: Peacock-themed decorative art finish

name: Mandala Harmony
desc: Intricate mandala patterns on ceramic.
longDesc: Intricate mandala patterns meticulously hand-painted on ceramic. This creation draws from ancient Buddhist and Hindu mandala traditions, representing the universe, wholeness, and harmony. The level of detail is extraordinary - every circle, petal, and line is placed with intention and care.
pot: Ceramic with hand-painted mandala patterns

name: Ocean Whisper
desc: Sea-inspired creative piece with wave textures.
longDesc: A sea-inspired creative piece with stunning wave textures. This creation captures the movement and rhythm of the ocean using layered textures, shades of blue, and subtle sand-like accents. Inspired by Sri Lanka beautiful southern coastline. A perfect gift for ocean lovers and dreamers.
pot: Wave-textured with layered blue tones

name: Forest Spirit
desc: Nature-themed sculptural decoration.
longDesc: A nature-themed sculptural decoration that brings the spirit of the Sri Lankan rainforest into your home. This creation features organic forms, deep green tones, and textures that evoke ancient tree bark and moss-covered stones. A truly unique piece of functional art that celebrates the wild beauty of nature.
pot: Nature-themed sculptural with organic textures

name: Sunset Canvas
desc: Warm gradient hand-painted art creation.
longDesc: A warm gradient hand-painted art creation that captures the beauty of a Sri Lankan sunset. Rich oranges, pinks, and purples blend seamlessly across the surface. This piece transforms an ordinary pot into a canvas of emotion and colour. Every viewing reveals new depth and warmth.
pot: Warm gradient hand-painted sunset finish

name: Garden Mosaic
desc: Mosaic-style creative garden decoration.
longDesc: A stunning mosaic-style creative garden decoration. Tiny, colourful pieces come together to form a garden scene - flowers, leaves, butterflies - creating a miniature world of beauty. This is one of our more intricate creations, requiring hours of careful placement. A true labour of love.
pot: Mosaic-style with colourful garden motifs

name: Celestial Dream
desc: Stars and moon themed decorative piece.
longDesc: A celestial-themed decorative piece featuring stars, moons, and cosmic swirls against a deep midnight blue background. Hand-painted with metallic silver and gold accents that catch the light beautifully. This creation brings a touch of magic and wonder to any space.
pot: Celestial theme with metallic accents on midnight blue

name: Tropical Art
desc: Exotic hand-painted tropical art piece.
longDesc: An exotic hand-painted tropical art piece bursting with the colours and energy of Sri Lanka tropical paradise. Lush foliage, tropical flowers, and vibrant birds are depicted in bold, expressive brushstrokes. This creation is for those who want to bring the energy of the tropics into their everyday life.
pot: Tropical art with bold expressive brushstrokes

name: Heritage Pattern
desc: Traditional Sri Lankan design patterns.
longDesc: Traditional Sri Lankan design patterns meticulously recreated on a modern surface. This creation bridges past and present - ancient Kandyan, Dutch colonial, and indigenous design elements are woven into a harmonious composition. A celebration of Sri Lanka rich, layered cultural heritage.
pot: Traditional Sri Lankan multi-heritage patterns

name: Blossom Art
desc: Cherry blossom themed creative artwork.
longDesc: A delicate cherry blossom themed creative artwork. Soft pink blossoms are painted against a misty, watercolour-style background. This creation captures the fleeting beauty of spring - the beauty of impermanence. An elegant and contemplative piece.
pot: Cherry blossom watercolour-style finish

name: Enchanted Forest
desc: Magical forest-inspired decorative creation.
longDesc: A magical forest-inspired decorative creation that transports you to an enchanted woodland. Twisted trees, fairy lights, and mysterious pathways are depicted in rich jewel tones and metallic accents. This piece is for the dreamers, the storytellers, and anyone who believes in a little magic.
pot: Enchanted forest theme with jewel tones and metallic accents

name: Golden Hour
desc: Warm gold-toned creative piece.
longDesc: A warm gold-toned creative piece that captures the magical quality of golden hour light. Rich amber, honey, and champagne tones create a luminous, glowing effect. This creation has a subtle, sophisticated beauty that complements both modern and traditional interiors.
pot: Gold-toned with amber, honey, and champagne finish

name: Ceramic Symphony
desc: Multi-coloured harmonious decoration.
longDesc: A multi-coloured harmonious decoration that brings together a symphony of colours - like a visual orchestra. Every colour is carefully balanced and placed, creating a piece that feels both vibrant and orderly. This creation celebrates the joy and diversity of colour itself.
pot: Multi-coloured harmonious symphony finish

name: Floral Tapestry
desc: Intricate floral tapestry design.
longDesc: An intricate floral tapestry design that transforms a simple surface into a rich tapestry of flowers. Inspired by traditional textile patterns, this creation weaves together roses, daisies, and wildflowers in a dense, beautiful composition. A tribute to the time-honoured art of floral tapestry.
pot: Floral tapestry-inspired dense composition

name: Spirit Garden
desc: Zen-inspired creative garden piece.
longDesc: A zen-inspired creative garden piece that embodies peace, mindfulness, and the beauty of simplicity. The design features minimalist garden elements - smooth stones, raked sand, and a single branch - in muted, calming tones. Perfect for meditation spaces, offices, or anywhere you seek tranquillity.
pot: Zen-inspired minimalist garden theme

name: Mystic Bloom
desc: Enchanting floral creation, mysterious and beautiful.
longDesc: An enchanting floral creation that is as mysterious as it is beautiful. Dark, moody backgrounds contrast with luminous flower blooms, creating a dramatic chiaroscuro effect. This piece has an almost otherworldly quality - as if the flowers are glowing from within. Our most atmospheric creation.
pot: Dramatic chiaroscuro with luminous bloom effect
